Listen to this Indian classical vocal scale. What is this sequence called?
This raga is considered one of the most expressive in Hindustani music. Identify it.
Listen to this percussion instrument. What is this iconic Indian rhythm instrument?
This shrill wind instrument is traditionally played at Indian weddings and auspicious occasions. Name it.

These metallic cymbals are used in Assamese folk festivals. What are they called?
Sa Re Ga Ma Pa are the notes of Indian classical music. How many notes (swaras) are there in total?
Raga Bhairavi is traditionally played at what time of day?
options: Any time (especially at the end of a concert)
